title: bromus tectorum var. scabriflorus
intro: Bromus tectorum var. scabriflorus, commonly known as cheatgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bromus tectorum var. scabriflorus include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions made from its leaves and stems, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
